compiled_state.title: Remove .tickets/ path patterns from CI workflows and example config files
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Remove all .tickets/ path-ignore and exclude patterns from CI workflow and example config files. These patterns reference the v2 .tickets/ directory which no longer exists in v3.

## TDD Exemption

Unit exemption criterion 3: "The task modifies only static assets (schema migrations with no branching logic, Markdown documentation, static config files) where no executable assertion is possible." The changes are pure text deletions from YAML config files — no conditional logic, no branching. The RED test (Task 1) serves as the behavioral verification.

## Files to Modify

### .github/workflows/ci.yml
- Line 15: Remove `- '.tickets/**'` from push trigger paths-ignore
- Line 21: Remove `- '.tickets/**'` from pull_request trigger paths-ignore

### examples/ci.example.yml
- Line 13: Remove `- '.tickets/**'` from pull_request trigger paths-ignore
- Line 27: Remove `- '.tickets/**'` from push trigger paths-ignore

### examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml
- Lines 56, 67, 81, 92, 103, 147, 169: Remove `exclude: '^\\.tickets/'` from each hook entry (isolation-check, poetry-lock-check, format-and-lint, security-scan, marker-check, import-check, check-assertion-density)

## Reliability Check (from story considerations)

After each file edit, verify via grep that only .tickets/ patterns were removed and no other paths-ignore entries were accidentally deleted:
- .github/workflows/ci.yml: paths-ignore should still contain `- '**/*.md'` on both triggers
- examples/ci.example.yml: paths-ignore should still contain `- '**/*.md'` on both triggers
- examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml: other exclude patterns (e.g., file-type patterns) must remain intact

## Post-implementation

After all edits, remove the [marker] RED annotations from all three .test-index entries for this story. The test (Task 1) should now PASS (GREEN).

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] ruff format --check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] No .tickets/ patterns remain in .github/workflows/ci.yml
  Verify: grep -c '\.tickets' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.github/workflows/ci.yml; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] No .tickets/ patterns remain in examples/ci.example.yml
  Verify: ! grep -q '\.tickets' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/examples/ci.example.yml
- [ ] No .tickets/ patterns remain in examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml
  Verify: ! grep -q '\.tickets' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml
- [ ] paths-ignore still contains '**/*.md' in .github/workflows/ci.yml (no accidental deletions)
  Verify: grep -q '\*\*/\*\.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.github/workflows/ci.yml
- [ ] paths-ignore still contains '**/*.md' in examples/ci.example.yml (no accidental deletions)
  Verify: grep -q '\*\*/\*\.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/examples/ci.example.yml
- [ ] Task 1 test now PASSES (GREEN): bash tests/scripts/test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh exits 0
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh
- [ ] .test-index [marker] annotations removed for all three source files
  Verify: ! grep '\[test_ci_yml_no_tickets_paths\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendment

AC amendment from gap analysis: The .test-index marker removal acceptance criterion only verified one of three markers. All three markers must be verified removed after implementation.

Additional Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] .test-index [marker] annotation removed for examples/ci.example.yml entry
  Verify: ! grep '\[test_ci_example_yml_no_tickets_paths\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] .test-index [marker] annotation removed for examples/pre-commit-config.example.yaml entry
  Verify: ! grep '\[test_precommit_example_no_tickets_exclude\]' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation passed ✓ — test-ci-no-v2-paths.sh: 3 pass, 0 fail. Two pre-existing failures in test-lifecycle-portability.sh and test-merge-to-main.sh (unrelated to this task).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: removed v2 .tickets path entries from CI workflows and pre-commit example config
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
